claims.description: CLI create/update/add/remove flows manage release boundary_ids.
claims.title: Release CLI plural boundary membership claim

claims.description: Certification and release flow guards evaluate all release boundaries.
claims.title: Release guards aggregate multiple boundaries claim

claims.description: Promotion and publication snapshots carry all release boundaries.
claims.title: Release snapshots list multiple boundaries claim

claims.description: Graph export emits a USES_BOUNDARY edge for every release boundary.
claims.title: Release graph edges include all boundaries claim

claims.description: Boundary-release conformance accepts and verifies plural release boundary membership.

claims.description: Schema 0.2.0 registries upgrade to 0.3.0 with release boundary_ids populated and ordered deterministically.

claims.description: The top-level `release` command exposes plural release boundary membership through command help and routed subcommands.

claims.description: `release create` accepts `--boundary-ids` and persists plural release boundary membership.
claims.title: CLI release create boundary_ids support claim

claims.description: `release update` accepts `--boundary-ids` and updates plural release boundary membership.
claims.title: CLI release update boundary_ids support claim

claims.description: `release add-boundary` appends one or more boundary ids to a release without replacing existing release membership.
claims.title: CLI release add-boundary subcommand claim

claims.description: `release remove-boundary` removes non-primary boundary ids while preserving the compatibility primary boundary.
claims.title: CLI release remove-boundary subcommand claim

claims.description: Track the individual `--boundary-ids` CLI flag as its own governed feature surface.
claims.title: CLI flag --boundary-ids claim

features.description: `release add-boundary` appends one or more boundary ids to a release without replacing existing release membership.
features.title: CLI release add-boundary subcommand

features.title: CLI release create boundary_ids support

features.description: `release remove-boundary` removes non-primary boundary ids while preserving the compatibility primary boundary.
features.title: CLI release remove-boundary subcommand

features.description: `release update` accepts `--boundary-ids` and updates plural release boundary membership.
features.title: CLI release update boundary_ids support

features.description: Support inline ADR and SPEC body text in ssot-core document mutations while preserving canonical persisted document shape.

features.description: Graph export emits a USES_BOUNDARY edge for every release boundary.

features.description: Promotion and publication snapshots carry all release boundaries.
